title: The Prime of Miss Jean Brodie
original_title: The Prime of Miss Jean Brodie
overview: A headstrong young teacher in a private school in 1930s Edinburgh ignores the curriculum and influences her impressionable 12-year-old charges with her over-romanticized worldview.
